title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: WeatherNext, Google DeepMind's global weather forecasting AI model, predicted Hurricane Melissa's intensity and track days in advance with high confidence in October 2025. The model's early warnings enabled the National Hurricane Center and local authorities to issue evacuation orders that protected vulnerable communities in Jamaica before the Category 5 storm made landfall.
